config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Society matters, but individual rights should not be treated as something society can override whenever it is convenient. In my view, a just society protects personal freedom, dignity, and due process first, because once those are weakened, abuse becomes easy to justify in the name of the common good. Public interests can limit individual rights in narrow cases, but only with strict rules and strong accountability.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya cenderung melihat hak individu sebagai batas utama yang tidak boleh gampang dilanggar hanya karena mayoritas merasa itu lebih praktis atau lebih aman. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi di AS kita punya sejarah panjang tentang bahaya ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan pelanggaran kebebasan, diskriminasi, atau penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Jadi, menurut saya, hak individu harus menjadi dasar, dan kepentingan masyarakat hanya boleh membatasi hak itu dalam keadaan yang benar-benar sempit, jelas, dan dapat dipertanggungjawabkan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should automatically come before the individual, because in Indonesia we have seen how “the public interest” can be used to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or excuse abuse by people in power. At the same time, I also do not accept a pure individualism that ignores communal responsibilities, because Indonesian life is very social and people do owe duties to one another. The right balance is that individual rights remain the baseline, while society can limit them only for clear, necessary, and lawful reasons, with real oversight. If that safeguard is missing, then “society first” becomes a convenient slogan for the strong to control the weak.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena, dari perspektif Amerika, hak individu harus tetap menjadi batas utama terhadap kekuasaan masyarakat maupun negara. Argumen bahwa “demi kepentingan umum” terdengar masuk akal, tetapi dalam sejarah AS alasan itu terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pelanggaran kebebasan sipil, diskriminasi, dan penyalahgunaan wewenang. Kepentingan publik memang nyata dan tidak bisa diabaikan, tetapi ia hanya boleh membatasi hak individu dalam keadaan yang sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji secara ketat. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” berubah menjadi dalih paling mudah untuk menindas kelompok yang tidak populer atau tidak berkuasa.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over the rights of the individual as a general rule. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of communal duty and social harmony, but I have also seen how “for the public good” can become a cover for silencing dissent, pressuring minorities, or protecting the powerful. Rights should be the baseline, and any restriction in the name of society must be narrow, lawful, and accountable. Without that, society-first logic too easily turns into control of the weak by the strong.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus mengambil prioritas atas hak individu sebagai aturan umum. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat bahaya nyata ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, diskriminasi, atau penyalahgunaan kekuasaan oleh mayoritas maupun negara. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi menurut saya ia hanya sah membatasi hak individu dalam keadaan yang sangat sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji secara ketat. Tanpa batas itu, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi alasan untuk menekan orang yang tidak populer atau tidak berkuasa.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
